title: cotoneaster microphyllus var. rotundifolius
intro: Cotoneaster microphyllus var. rotundifolius is a lesser-known variety of the Cotoneaster microphyllus shrub, which is a type of flowering plant native to China. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. Cotoneaster microphyllus var. rotundifolius can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
